customData.podcast_survey_writing_style: Counter Intuitive - Challenge the obvious and flip what people expect
customData.q1: The harder I pushed for control, the less I actually had.
customData.q2: I measured success by exhaustion and called it discipline.
customData.q3: Letting go of the plan was the moment the business finally grew.
customData.q4: Trust compounds faster than effort ever will.
customData.podcast_interview_smiq: I almost did not admit that I nearly shut the whole thing down last winter.
customData.podcast_survey__additional_info: Please keep the tone warm and direct.
